Rest.structure: donors 1-2 on R1; donors 3-4 on R2

Stim8hr.structure: donors 1-2 on R1; donors 3-4 on R2

interpretation: For Rest/Stim8hr, the donors 1-2 versus 3-4 partition is fully run-confounded, while the two mixed-run 2-versus-2 partitions are run-balanced. All Stim48hr libraries are on R2, limiting cross-condition run support.
